meta.title: Pilot Program - Baara
meta.description: Test Baara for 4 weeks on a real position. Work sample, structured evaluation, candidate feedback.

hero.title: 4-week pilot —
hero.subtitle: Test our approach on a real hire. No demo, no fake data: you evaluate real candidates with our method.

benefits.item1: A real position of your choice

form.title: Request a pilot (4 weeks)
form.subtitle: Validate a proven shortlist in 7 days on a real Go/Infra job. We measure before/after: time-to-shortlist, interviews/hire, shortlist→hire.

step1.emailHelper: We'll respond within 48h with a detailed proposal.

step2.baselinePainPointPlaceholder: Ex: too much noise at screening / cycle too long…
step2.jobLinkPlaceholder: URL of the job description if it exists
step2.messagePlaceholder: What you want to improve, constraints…
step2.consent: I agree to be contacted by Baara about the pilot.

confirmation.title: Thanks — we'll get back to you soon.
confirmation.demoCta: In the meantime, you can watch the demo (10 min).

workSample.title: Customized work sample
workSample.description: Exercise calibrated for your role, ≤60 min for the candidate.

aiEval.title: AI initial evaluation
aiEval.description: Automated first-pass analysis to save time.

humanReview.title: Human review
humanReview.description: Mandatory validation by a human evaluator.

feedback.title: Integrated candidate feedback
feedback.description: Automatic, personalized feedback for each candidate.

week1.title: Setup
week1.description: Position definition, work sample and rubric creation with our team.

week2.title: First candidates
week2.description: Launch invitations. Candidates complete the work sample at their pace.

week3.title: Iteration
week3.description: Collaborative evaluation, adjustments if needed, continuous feedback.

week4.title: Review
week4.description: Results analysis, hiring decisions, experience feedback.

job.title: 1 open tech position
job.description: A real active hiring need, not a test.

time.title: ~2h per week
time.description: For evaluation and exchanges with our team.

feedback.title: Honest feedback
feedback.description: Your input helps us improve the product.

pricing.title: Free during the pilot
pricing.description: No fees for 4 weeks. Decide after.

realJob.question: Is this really on a real position?
realJob.answer: Yes. No demo or fake data. You test our method on an actual ongoing hire.

cost.question: What's the cost of the pilot?
cost.answer: The pilot is free. You decide whether to continue or not, with no commitment.

time.question: How much time do I need to invest?
time.answer: About 2 hours per week: evaluating work samples and exchanges with our team.

candidates.question: Where do the candidates come from?
candidates.answer: You invite your own candidates (existing sourcing) or we can help you source some.

after.question: What happens after the pilot?
after.answer: Review together. If it works, preferential pricing to continue. If not, no obligation.

techStack.question: What type of positions are eligible?
techStack.answer: Technical roles (dev, SRE, data, etc.). We'll expand to other roles after the pilot phase.

cta.title: Ready to test on a real position?
cta.description: 4 weeks to validate that our approach works for you.
